title: Sea Around Us -- Reconstructed Catch Data, Saudi Arabia (Red Sea) EEZ
abstract: Sea Around Us (SAU) reconstructed marine fisheries catch data for the Saudi Arabia (Red Sea) Exclusive Economic Zone (EEZ ID 683), 1950-2019. Combines officially reported FAO landings with reconstructed estimates of unreported catch and discards, broken down by species, functional/commercial group, fishing entity, sector (artisanal/subsistence/industrial/recreational), gear type, and end use, with landed value estimates. A general-purpose spatial/statistical reference layer, not itself an ecological field survey, but commonly used alongside ecological survey data for fisheries-pressure context.

resources.name: SAU EEZ 683 catch data (CSV)
resources.path: KAUST - DATA/Ecological/eco reomote/SAU EEZ 683 v50-1/SAU EEZ 683 v50-1.csv

variables.name: area_name
variables.label: EEZ Area Name
variables.description: Always 'Saudi Arabia (Red Sea)' in this extract.

variables.name: scientific_name
variables.label: Scientific Name
variables.description: Taxon reported/reconstructed, may be a taxon group (e.g. 'Marine fishes not identified').

variables.name: tonnes
variables.label: Catch
variables.description: Reconstructed catch weight for the row's species/sector/gear/reporting-status combination.

variables.name: landed_value
variables.label: Landed Value
variables.description: Estimated landed value; blank for discards.

access.how_to_request: Freely downloadable from seaaroundus.org; local copy retrieved 2026-03-11 per the bundled readme.txt.

provenance.originator: Sea Around Us (University of British Columbia / partners)
provenance.citation: Sea Around Us. Reconstructed catch data, Data version 50.1. Downloaded 11 March 2026. See http://www.seaaroundus.org/citation-policy/ for full citation guidance.

known_issues: Not a Red-Sea field survey -- this is a spatial/statistical reference/context layer (EEZ-wide reconstructed catch), included per project scope as a supporting dataset.
SAU 'reconstructed' catch includes modeled/estimated components (see readme.txt), not purely observed data; uncertainty_score column present in source but not summarized here.
domain set to ['ecological','production'] as a cross-cutting fisheries dataset; could arguably live solely under production -- flagged for review.
A duplicate .zip archive of the unzipped folder also exists alongside it (SAU EEZ 683 v50-1.zip) -- not catalogued separately.
